prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **BFH 3.2L VR6** (250 HP) with a **HPA Motorsports Stage 3+ VR6** build featuring forged internals (Mahle pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ARP studs), a **Schrick 288° camshaft** (intake/exhaust), and a **custom 3.6L stroker kit** (89mm crank, 84.5mm bore) for 400+ HP on 93 octane with a **Neuspeed VR6-specific intake manifold** and **034 Motorsport billet throttle body**.

Forced Induction: Install a **Garrett GT3076R turbocharger** (0.82 A/R, ball-bearing) with a **custom VR6-specific turbo manifold** (e.g., **CTS Turbo T3/T4 manifold**), **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate**, **TurboSmart Race Port BOV**, and a **custom 3.5" intercooler piping kit** (e.g., **Forge Motorsport**). Pair with a **Bosch 044 fuel pump**, **Siemens DEKA 60lb injectors**, and a **Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU** for precise boost control (18-20 psi) and ignition timing.

Drivetrain: Upgrade to a **02M 6-speed transmission** (from Audi TT 3.2) with a **South Bend Stage 3+ clutch**, **Peloquin LSD**, and **034 Motorsport transmission mount insert**. For the rear, install a **Quattro GmbH RS3-spec rear diff** (40% lock) with **custom CV axles** (e.g., **Neuspeed VR6-specific axles**) and a **034 Motorsport subframe reinforcement kit**.
estetica: Body Kit: Apply a **Rieger Tuning RS3-style widebody kit** (fiberglass, bolt-on) with **custom 20mm spacers** (e.g., **H&R TRAK+**) and **OEM+ RS3 front bumper** (with **LED DRLs from K-Motionz**). Paint in **Nardo Grey (L94N)** with **gloss black RS3-style grille** and **carbon fiber mirror caps** (e.g., **Maxton Design**).

Wheels/Suspension: Mount **BBS RS-GT 9.5x19" ET35** wheels (staggered, 9.5" front/10.5" rear) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires** (235/35/19 front, 265/30/19 rear). Lower with **KW Clubsport coilovers** (2-way adjustable, 30mm drop) and **034 Motorsport sway bars** (25mm front, 22mm rear). Add **H&R camber plates** and **polyurethane bushings** (e.g., **Powerflex Black Series**).

Interior: Replace seats with **Recaro Pole Position II** (cloth/Alcantara, 8-way adjustable) and install a **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm, suede). Add a **custom roll cage** (e.g., **Custom Cages 6-point bolt-in**) with **Schroth Profi II ASM harnesses**, **AEM X-Series wideband gauge**, and **OMP carbon fiber shift knob** (for 02M gearbox). Retrim door cards in **Nappa leather (Black/Red stitching)** with **RS3-style aluminum door pulls**.
